name: Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA
summary: Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA, together with its subsidiaries, provides scheduled and charter airline services in Norway and internationally. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated a total of 131 aircraft, whereas 55 owned and 76 leased aircrafts with a route network across Europe into North Africa, the Middle East, North America, South America, and South-East Asia. It is also involved in aircraft financing, leasing, and ownership activities; and cargo activities. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Fornebu, Norway.
